what_it_does: This file is a metadata record for a channel attachment, declaring an attachment identifier, the channel it belongs to, an attachment type, a target board item URI, and an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
standouts: Target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-6e6c7ab3
concerns: No payload or descriptive content beyond metadata
The meaning/content of the referenced board item is not present
notes: A bare channel-attachment metadata stub that links a dragnet-development attachment to a board item by URI.
questions: What content or artifact does this attachment actually carry?
What is board://item-6e6c7ab3 and what does it represent?
Who added this attachment and why?
purpose_vs_actual: No explicit purpose is stated; the content acts as a typed, timestamped link between a channel attachment and a board item, which matches the expected role of an attachment metadata file.
intention_signals: It appears intended to record that a board-item attachment was added to the dragnet-development channel at a specific time, creating a durable reference to an external board item.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme as the target reference.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel attachment identifier and a board item target, supporting traceability of channel-related board items.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file linking attachment att-2d5da92a in dragnet-development to board item board://item-6e6c7ab3 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record the addition of a board-items attachment to the dragnet-development channel for later lookup and provenance.
